name: Magellan Financial Group Limited
analysis: MFG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$9.7100, stop A$8.4645, target A$11.5500 (1.48:1) — then trail it.
